figures.caption: Table 3. Annual average of forest and sea ice cover indicators (unit: %).

Figure 2. a, The spatial distribution of global land-ocean cover in 2025. b, The temporal change of the area percentage of each type from 2022 to 2025. The percentage of sea ice cover is calculated by the global ocean area, and the other nine types are calculated by the global land area. The temporal change from 2018 to 2021 is shown in Fig. S1.
